systems.PURPOSE: Root unified OS with avatar UI, FastAPI backend, and runtime management
Unified topology/architecture mapping system with PM2 process management
Distributed mesh network with federation, AI nodes, and discovery

relationships.SHARED_DATA: BRIDGE_AI_OS gateway routes to localhost:3000 (bridgeos frontend); bridgeos gateway forwards /health checks
bridgeos/unified/gateway.js forwards /ask requests to localhost:3001 (BridgeAI ainode for LLM inference)
relationships.CONFLICT_RISK: MEDIUM — silent fallback if ainode unavailable; tight coupling

relationships.SHARED_DATA: Both have gateway.js with similar routing logic; both expose /health; both do process management
No direct code references found; conceptually related (UBI payments via blockchain)

duplicate_features: gateway.js present in: BRIDGE_AI_OS, bridgeos, aoe-unified-final — 3 separate gateway implementations
system.js present in both aoe-unified-final and bridgeos/unified/
topology.html duplicated in aoe-unified-final and bridgeos
Process management: BRIDGE_AI_OS (runtime manager) vs bridgeos (PM2)
overlap_analysis.shared_databases: NONE — each system maintains isolated data stores

critical_issues: Port 3000 used by 4 different servers — cannot all run simultaneously
3 separate gateway implementations doing similar routing — no single source of truth
No shared data layer — consolidation requires data migration strategy
BRIDGE_AI_OS avatar calls ws://localhost:8000 but FastAPI is on 8000 (not a WebSocket server for avatar use)
summary.consolidation_recommendation: HIGH COMPLEXITY — recommend phased consolidation: (1) unify gateways behind Traefik, (2) migrate SQLite → PostgreSQL in bridgeos, (3) consolidate duplicate UIs, (4) establish shared Redis state layer
